fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKWebpEncoder` is a static class for encoding images and animated sequences to WebP format. Use the <xref:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoder.Encode*> overloads to encode a single <xref:SkiaSharp.SKPixmap> to WebP data or a stream. Use the <xref:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoder.EncodeAnimated*> overloads to create animated WebP files from a sequence of <xref:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame> values.

## Examples

```csharp
using var bitmap = new SKBitmap(200, 200);
using var canvas = new SKCanvas(bitmap);
canvas.Clear(SKColors.CornflowerBlue);

var options = new SKWebpEncoderOptions(SKWebpEncoderCompression.Lossy, 80);
using var data = SKWebpEncoder.Encode(bitmap.PeekPixels(), options);
File.WriteAllBytes("output.webp", data.ToArray());
```
]]></format>
fields.summary: Provides static methods for encoding images and image sequences to WebP format.

params.src: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPixmap" /> containing the pixel data to encode.

fields.returns: An <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKData" /> containing the encoded WebP data, or <see langword="null" /> if encoding failed.
fields.summary: Encodes a pixmap to WebP format and returns the result as an <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKData" />.

entries.signature: public static SkiaSharp.SKData? Encode (SkiaSharp.SKPixmap src, SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options);

params.dst: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKWStream" /> to write the encoded WebP data to.
params.src: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPixmap" /> containing the pixel data to encode.

fields.returns: true if encoding succeeded; otherwise, false.
fields.summary: Encodes a pixmap to WebP format and writes the result to an <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKWStream" />.

entries.signature: public static bool Encode (SkiaSharp.SKWStream dst, SkiaSharp.SKPixmap src, SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options);

params.src: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPixmap" /> containing the pixel data to encode.
